title: How to Beat AI in Your Dev Job Search
summary: AWS Developers offers career guidance for developers in an AI-saturated job market, emphasizing networking, personal branding, and open source contributions over mass applications. The video argues that junior developers remain valuable and suggests practical steps like building projects and blogging to stand out.
writeup: AWS Developers addresses how developers can navigate a job market saturated with AI, arguing that junior developers retain value and that quality differentiation beats volume in applications. The advice centers on networking, personal branding, and open source contributions rather than mass applying. Concrete steps include building projects and blogging to establish a visible track record and a distinct brand identity.
